member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.ApplicationIntent
member.summary: Declares the application workload type when connecting to a database in an SQL Server Availability Group. You can set the value of this property with Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.ApplicationIntent.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.ApplicationName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the application associated with the connection string.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.AttachDBFilename
member.summary: Gets or sets a string that contains the name of the primary data file. This includes the full path name of an attachable database.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.Authentication
member.summary: Gets the authentication of the connection string.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.ColumnEncryptionSetting
member.summary: Gets or sets the column encryption settings for the connection string builder.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.CommandTimeout
member.summary: The default wait time (in seconds) before terminating the attempt to execute a command and generating an error. The default is 30 seconds.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.ConnectRetryCount
member.summary: The number of reconnections attempted after identifying that there was an idle connection failure. This must be an integer between 0 and 255. Default is 1. Set to 0 to disable reconnecting on idle connection failures. An System.ArgumentException will be thrown if set to a value outside of the allowed range.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.ConnectRetryInterval
member.summary: Amount of time (in seconds) between each reconnection attempt after identifying that there was an idle connection failure. This must be an integer between 1 and 60. The default is 10 seconds. An System.ArgumentException will be thrown if set to a value outside of the allowed range.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.ConnectTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of time (in seconds) to wait for a connection to the server before terminating the attempt and generating an error.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.CurrentLanguage
member.summary: Gets or sets the SQL Server Language record name.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.DataSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the name or network address of the instance of SQL Server to connect to.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.AttestationProtocol
member.summary: Set/Get the value of Attestation Protocol.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.EnclaveAttestationUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the enclave attestation Url to be used with enclave based Always Encrypted.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.Encrypt
member.summary: Gets or sets a Boolean value that indicates whether SQL Server uses SSL encryption for all data sent between the client and server if the server has a certificate installed.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.Enlist
member.summary: Gets or sets a Boolean value that indicates whether the SQL Server connection pooler automatically enlists the connection in the creation thread's current transaction context.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.FailoverPartner
member.summary: Gets or sets the name or address of the partner server to connect to if the primary server is down.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.InitialCatalog
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the database associated with the connection.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.IntegratedSecurity
member.summary: Gets or sets a Boolean value that indicates whether User ID and Password are specified in the connection (when false) or whether the current Windows account credentials are used for authentication (when true).

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.LoadBalanceTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum time, in seconds, for the connection to live in the connection pool before being destroyed.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.MaxPoolSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of connections allowed in the connection pool for this specific connection string.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.MinPoolSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum number of connections allowed in the connection pool for this specific connection string.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.MultipleActiveResultSets
member.summary: When true, an application can maintain multiple active result sets (MARS). When false, an application must process or cancel all result sets from one batch before it can execute any other batch on that connection. For more information, see [Multiple Active Result Sets (MARS)](https://msdn.microsoft.com//library/cfa084cz.aspx).

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.MultiSubnetFailover
member.summary: If your application is connecting to an AlwaysOn availability group (AG) on different subnets, setting MultiSubnetFailover=true provides faster detection of and connection to the (currently) active server. For more information about SqlClient support for Always On Availability Groups, see [SqlClient Support for High Availability, Disaster Recovery](/dotnet/framework/data/adonet/sql/sqlclient-support-for-high-availability-disaster-recovery).

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.PacketSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size in bytes of the network packets used to communicate with an instance of SQL Server.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.Password
member.summary: Gets or sets the password for the SQL Server account.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.PersistSecurityInfo
member.summary: Gets or sets a Boolean value that indicates if security-sensitive information, such as the password, is not returned as part of the connection if the connection is open or has ever been in an open state.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.Pooling
member.summary: Gets or sets a Boolean value that indicates whether the connection will be pooled or explicitly opened every time that the connection is requested.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.Replication
member.summary: Gets or sets a Boolean value that indicates whether replication is supported using the connection.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.TransactionBinding
member.summary: Gets or sets a string value that indicates how the connection maintains its association with an enlisted System.Transactions transaction.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.TrustServerCertificate
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether the channel will be encrypted while bypassing walking the certificate chain to validate trust.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.TypeSystemVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets a string value that indicates the type system the application expects.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.UserID
member.summary: Gets or sets the user ID to be used when connecting to SQL Server.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.UserInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether to redirect the connection from the default SQL Server Express instance to a runtime-initiated instance running under the account of the caller.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.WorkstationID
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the workstation connecting to SQL Server.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.PoolBlockingPeriod
member.summary: The blocking period behavior for a connection pool.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.BrowsableConnectionString
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether the System.Data.Common.DbConnectionStringBuilder.ConnectionString property is visible in Visual Studio designers.

member.name: P:Apeiron.Platform.Server.Database.Connection.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection string associated with the System.Data.Common.DbConnectionStringBuilder.
